final:
module RefModule (
    input wire T,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire EN,
    output reg Q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (EN) begin
            if (T) begin
                Q <= ~Q; // Toggle Q if T is high
            end
            // If T is low, Q remains the same
        end
    end
endmodule
